title: CBIC Extends Customs Duty Exemption on Petrochemical Products to July 15, 2026
content:
# CBIC Extends Customs Duty Exemption on Petrochemical Products to July 15, 2026

Ek important update hai! Government ne specified petrochemical products par customs duty exemption ki validity further extend kar di hai. This move aims to provide continued relief to industries amidst ongoing global supply chain disruptions, particularly those stemming from the West Asia conflict.

Here are the key details:

*   **Old Expiry Date:** The customs duty exemption was initially valid up to June 30, 2026.
*   **New Expiry Date:** The exemption has now been extended by 15 days, making it valid up to and including **July 15, 2026**.
*   **Notification Details:** This extension has been announced through **Notification No. 22/2026-Customs**, dated **June 30, 2026**.
*   **Amendment:** This notification amends the earlier **Notification No. 12/2026-Customs, dated April 1, 2026**, which originally introduced the exemption. The list of 40 critical petrochemical products covered under the exemption remains unchanged.
*   **Purpose:** The extension is a temporary and targeted measure to ensure the uninterrupted availability of essential petrochemical inputs for domestic industries and to ease cost pressures on downstream sectors like plastics, packaging, textiles, pharmaceuticals, chemicals, and automotive components.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Visit the CBIC Homepage for Official Updates](https://www.cbic.gov.in)

*Published on: 3 July 2026*
